title: Pixel Genesis Remixes Soundtrack
description: This is a soundtrack of the Pixel Remixes video from the Minecraft channel.
body:
##
[![minecraft-title-4.png](https://i.postimg.cc/q7MhwFV1/minecraft-title-4.png)](https://postimg.cc/qNSvMj7K)
##
This is a resource pack that includes all the Pixel remixes uploaded by Minecraft Youtube Channel.\
It replaces all of the **survival** songs for the lo-fi ones.  


## Track list:
- Track 1 - Featherfall - Remix: Hyper Potions
- Track 2 - Watcher - Remix: Synthion
- Track 3 - Puzzlebox - Remix: AIKA
- Track 4 - komorebi - Remix: AIKA
- Track 5 - pokopoko - Remix: Synthion
- Track 6 - yakusoku - Remix: leon chang
- Track 7 - Infinite Amethyst - Remix: Snail's House
- Track 8 - Deeper - Remix: Elliot Hsu
- Track 9 - Eld Unknown - Remix: Elliot Hsu
- Track 10 - Endless - Remix: Anamanaguchi
- Track 11 - Creator - Remix: leon chang
- Track 12 - Precipice - Remix: Hyper Potions

## Warning ⚠️
This pack is **not compatible** with any other resources packs that modifies these songs.

**I highly recommend to set the music bar sound to ~10/20%.** I am probably changing the music volume on future updates.


## Original video:
